textByHash.1359a689b06968328013e4880f22fef5f6e089e5: And who da heck are you?
textByHash.d5f3bb7fce2185abf4263c324d69b22a7e55b96d: And what if it is? Tassie got into an arrangement that is mutually beneficial, as far as I understood it, she was happy with the deal.
textByHash.75fec9efab78d98f41f9dfec2db0a21d1593a21b: Oh, so you wanna give me something for leaving Tassie alone?
textByHash.8d182f99aef891f4517e81bd93386914458cd338: Where would I be if I just left all of my 'customers' alone? Some people just need an extra 'encouragement' to make the best out of life...I'm just helping them along.
textByHash.9e196d7bbdacbc79d6aa654ba9c0b899177aa25b: Well...now that you come to mention it, I guess I have been a little hard on the girl.
textByHash.9bc513acac2f0adc98d25831d5d7e744ab6dd88b: And I guess I am quite stressed about things, what with so much to think about recently.
textByHash.1fa3b02cbe882233a6111227811f80f6d5c7ff16: Hmm, yes, yes you're right...I did want to do something, something I noticed recently, but you'll laugh if I tell you...nah, it's silly.
textByHash.a2664ca0c4d0fe3708aed515a4fd381628e85825: Well, I was just thinking the other day that I'm feeling sort of unfulfilled in my life.
textByHash.a47d6d10597fff39f0e8eda769b4be28ab23a328: I'd like to get rid of all this anger and frustration that my current lifestyle brings and do something relaxing...like those druids, I mean, all day sitting around, looking at herbs and wearing robes and stuff.
textByHash.68ae998e377e3cb38e378852c2a933de6daa0e57: Yeah, yeah, I really want to be a druid...so...go and see the druid leader, I think Sanfew is his name, and persuade him to take me as an initiate. Do me this one small favour and I'll leave Tassie alone.
textByHash.a03c18b6fd6ae99970b20900b369775d803bb2db: Whatever...I guess Tassie's gonna be working hard for a bit longer yet then!
textByHash.0a1d42c6ffa429241b30d80b4c029e096c2335e4: Good...I mean great! Come back when Sanfew has agreed to take me as an initiate!
textByHash.3eac0f5960ac9b3fbae479c45a7eb6400279afdc: Go and talk to Sanfew and get him to accept me as a druid initiate!
textByHash.6ccac4dc08f1d0c60247dfa112b6a02b4df2ee11: Oh, it's you! Back are you then?
textByHash.ca759b58767d903e00b93cf626013c879a1c8fa1: Ha, ha ha ha! How funny is that! I've gone and changed my mind now! I've decided that I make a far better gangster than I ever would a druid!
textByHash.fbdf6c74112de5d34ae0bedbf2566ef36a4e54d5: My men are going to deal with you!
textByHash.3b9a90df76bd807900b3d7afabc902f7b4479a7d: Well...sure if you're not full of surprises then...I guess I'll have to either hire more men to try and kill you or forget Tassie's loan.
textByHash.3807fe28ff52d80d23fc2d5001480bac10da749b: Ok then, fair enough....I'll leave her alone...but I'm going to deal with you personally one of these days!
textByHash.cbdd35ad96f7d910a5391cd67ae09a15675625e4: You looking at me? I don't see nobody else here!
